name: 6q22_31_NUMT_insertion
description: 6q22.31 NUMT insertion — a ~10 kb nuclear-mitochondrial-DNA insertion at chr6:124-125 Mb covering parts of mtDNA from ND4 to ATP6 at ~97% identity to rCRS. Listed in the Mitomap NUMT database (Lascaro 2008); contributes to false-positive heteroplasmy artefacts particularly for ND4/ND5/CYTB reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Single ~10 kb mtDNA-derived insertion covering ND4L-ATP6 region at ~97% identity to rCRS; flanked by unique nuclear sequence.
